installMacros.name: Install API Macros
installMacros.label: Install Macros
installMacros.hint: Creates a folder of ready-to-use macros for every module API function in your Macros sidebar.

macroPromptMode.name: Sample Macro Import Prompt
macroPromptMode.hint: Controls when or if Draw Steel: Combat Tools should prompt the Director to import sample macros on load.

choice.skipUpdate: Ask only when the module updates

quickStrikeCompat.name: Draw Steel: Quick Strike
quickStrikeCompat.hint: Routes collision and fall damage through Quick Strike's socket so it appears in its chat log with source info and its undo button. DSCT's undo still handles position and status restoration independently.

dstdQuickFmButton.name: Quick Forced Movement Button
dstdQuickFmButton.hint: When multiple targets are present, adds a condensed Forced Movement button to the collapsed target header alongside the damage button. The damage button is shortened to icon and number only to fit both.

playerCanUndoDstdDeaths.name: Players Can Undo Deaths via Target Damage
playerCanUndoDstdDeaths.hint: Allows players to utilize the undo button.

minionHealthEstimate.name: Minion Health Estimate Display
minionHealthEstimate.hint: Controls how Health Estimate behaves on minion tokens that are part of an active combat squad. Outside of combat, or when a minion has no squad group, Health Estimate is unaffected.

forcedMovementEnabled.name: Forced Movement
forcedMovementEnabled.hint: Controls all Forced Movement functionality like the panel and chat messages, as well as all related automation.

forcedMovementSettings.name: Forced Movement Settings
forcedMovementSettings.label: Configure Forced Movement
forcedMovementSettings.hint: Adjust animation speed, fall and friendly fire confirmation prompts, and Director-only movement restrictions.

animationStepDelay.name: Animation Step Delay (ms)
animationStepDelay.hint: Time in milliseconds between each square of animated forced movement. Set to 0 to disable animation.

fallDamageCap.name: Fall Damage Cap
fallDamageCap.hint: Maximum damage an actor can take from a single fall.

fallConfirmation.name: Fall Confirmation
fallConfirmation.hint: Show a confirmation prompt in chat before resolving a token falls.

friendlyFireConfirmation.name: Friendly Fire Confirmation
friendlyFireConfirmation.hint: Show a confirmation prompt in chat when forced movement would cause an ally to take collision damage.

ignoreAllyEnabled.name: Allow Allies to Dodge
ignoreAllyEnabled.hint: Allow smaller allies to get out of the way of big enemies using a chat confirmation prompt. Requires Friendly Fire Confirmation.

corpsesBlock.name: Corpses Block Movement
corpsesBlock.hint: Defeated tokens act as indestructible obstacles during forced movement.

fmModifyGmOnly.name: Restrict Modify Button to Director
fmModifyGmOnly.hint: Only the Director can see the pencil modify button on forced movement chat messages. Disable to let all players use it.

grabEnabled.name: Grab
grabEnabled.hint: Automates all aspects of the grab condition as per the Draw Steel rules, active grabs can be ended via the Grab panel.

gmBypassesSizeCheck.name: Director Bypasses Size Check
gmBypassesSizeCheck.hint: The Director can execute Knockback and Grab regardless of target size.

restrictGrabButtons.name: Restrict Automatic Grab Buttons to Director
restrictGrabButtons.hint: Only the Director can see and click the Apply Grab and End Grab buttons in the Grab Panel, which bypass the need for a check.

allowIllegalMovement.name: Allow Illegal Movement
allowIllegalMovement.hint: Allow actors to move even under conditions that would forbid it, but provide a reminder of the condition that should prevent movement.

frightenedEnabled.name: Frightened
frightenedEnabled.hint: Automates all aspects of the frightened condition as per the Draw Steel rules.

appliedEffectEnabled.name: Applied Effect Retargeting
appliedEffectEnabled.hint: Makes it so applied effect buttons on ability messages apply to Targeted token instead of selected token, and allows players to apply effects to unowned tokens if Director is online.

applyDamageEnabled.name: Applied Damage Retargeting
applyDamageEnabled.hint: Makes it so damage buttons on ability messages apply to Targeted tokens instead of selected tokens, and allows players to apply damage to unowned tokens if Director is online.

tauntedEnabled.name: Taunted
tauntedEnabled.hint: Automates all aspects of the taunted condition as per the Draw Steel rules.

conditionsSettings.name: Conditions & Damage
conditionsSettings.label: Configure Conditions & Damage
conditionsSettings.hint: Toggle and configure automation for Frightened, Taunted, Bleeding, Grab, and area damage.

areaDamageEnabled.name: Area Damage Automation
areaDamageEnabled.hint: Labels damage buttons on area abilities and caps area damage dealt to squad minions at their max stamina.

squadStaminaClamp.name: Squad Stamina Overclamp Guard
squadStaminaClamp.hint: Prevents a squad's total stamina from exceeding alive-minion count times individual max stamina after an update. Disable if sequential undo/revival causes stamina to clamp incorrectly.

bleedingEnabled.name: Bleeding
bleedingEnabled.hint: Automates all aspects of the bleeding condition as per the Draw Steel rules.

bleedingMode.name: Bleeding Automation Mode
bleedingMode.hint: Controls whether Bleeding automatically applies damage and offers an undo, or just reminds to roll damage.

deathTrackerEnabled.name: Death Tracker
deathTrackerEnabled.hint: Automatically hide defeated enemies from combat, preceded by an optional death animation, log their defeat in chat. Defeated creatures stay in place, tinted red, and can still be force moved.

deathTrackerManualMode.name: Manual Mode
deathTrackerManualMode.hint: Disables all automatic death processing (death animation, chat log, minion defeat handling). Orphaned combatant cleanup still runs. Use this if you want to trigger kills through macros or your own workflow.

deathTrackerSettings.name: Death Tracker Settings
deathTrackerSettings.label: Configure Death Tracker
deathTrackerSettings.hint: Adjust animation duration, end-of-combat cleanup, revive behavior, and minion defeat options.

deathAnimationDuration.name: Death Animation Duration (ms)
deathAnimationDuration.hint: How long the red fade-out animation lasts before the token settles into its defeated state. Set to 0 to skip.

batchAnimationSafety.name: Skip Animation on Mass Kill
batchAnimationSafety.hint: When 8 or more tokens are killed simultaneously, skip the red fade animation to reduce lag. Tokens still snap to their final defeated state instantly.

clearSkullsOnCombatEnd.name: Clear Defeated Tokens at Combat End
clearSkullsOnCombatEnd.hint: All defeated tokens are removed from the scene when combat ends.

clearEffectsOnRevive.name: Clear Effects on Revive
clearEffectsOnRevive.hint: Reviving a creature automatically removes all active conditions and effects.

autoAssignDamagedMinion.name: Auto-Assign Damaged Minion on Death
autoAssignDamagedMinion.hint: Controls automated minion death selection. On: the Death Tracker tracks which minion was hit and automatically chooses who dies when a squad takes partial damage. Off: only full squad wipes are resolved automatically; partial kills require the Director to assign deaths manually.

pickDeathsEnabled.name: Pick Ambiguous Deaths
pickDeathsEnabled.hint: When it's unclear which minions should die (more must die than took damage, fewer must die than took damage, or no damage was tracked at all), show a canvas picker so you can choose. When off, the system picks automatically.

overrideMinionDefeat.name: Alternative Minion Defeat UI
overrideMinionDefeat.hint: Replace the Draw Steel system's minion defeat selection dialog with the Death Tracker's automated defeat processing.

cleanOrphanedCombatants.name: Clean Up Orphaned Combat Tracker Entries
cleanOrphanedCombatants.hint: Automatically removes Combat Tracker entries whose token or actor no longer exists. Runs on load and whenever a token or actor is deleted.

deathMarkerEnabled.name: Show Death Marker
deathMarkerEnabled.hint: Place a Death Marker tile under defeated NPC tokens. The tile follows if the token is moved and disappears when revived.

deathMarkerIcon.name: Death Marker Icon
deathMarkerIcon.hint: Icon for the Death Marker tile.

combatLogsSettings.name: Combat Logs
combatLogsSettings.label: Configure Combat Logs
combatLogsSettings.hint: Configure combat event logging to the chat window.

squadLabelsSettings.name: Squad Labels Settings
squadLabelsSettings.label: Configure Squad Labels
squadLabelsSettings.hint: Configure automatic squad label behavior during combat.

autoSquadLabelsEnabled.name: Enable Squad Labels
autoSquadLabelsEnabled.hint: Prompts to apply purely visual squad label effects to squads when combat starts. Optionally renames squads to match numbers with labels.

squadLabelAutoRelabel.name: Auto-Relabel on Group Changes
squadLabelAutoRelabel.hint: When a squad is fully wiped or all its minions die, automatically rename remaining groups to fill numbering gaps and reapply labels.

squadLabelCaptainNow.name: I Am The Captain Now
squadLabelCaptainNow.hint: Prompt the Director to assign a captain to minion squads that lack one at the start of combat or start of the round.

squadCaptainShortcut.name: Captain Shortcut Assignment
squadCaptainShortcut.hint: When enabled and the number of available captain candidates exactly matches the number of squads needing a captain, automatically assign each candidate to a squad without opening the picker.

autoTriggeredActionsEnabled.name: Triggered Action Tracker
autoTriggeredActionsEnabled.hint: Automatically place the Unspent Triggered Action effect on set combatants when combat starts, which then gets removed upon using a Triggered Action ability and is refreshed at round start.

triggeredActionsSettings.name: Triggered Actions Settings
triggeredActionsSettings.label: Configure Triggered Actions
triggeredActionsSettings.hint: Choose which combatants receive the tracker and whether to require a triggered ability on their sheet.

autoTriggeredActionsTarget.name: Triggered Action Tracker Targets
autoTriggeredActionsTarget.hint: Who should receive the Triggered Action tracker at the start of combat?

triggeredActionsRequireAbility.name: Only Track Combatants With Triggered Abilities
triggeredActionsRequireAbility.hint: Apply Unspent Triggered Action effect only to combatants that have at least one triggered ability on their sheet.

teleportEnabled.name: Enable Teleport Tool
teleportEnabled.hint: UI and API to enable teleporting a controlled token across the battlemap.

abilityAutomationSettings.name: Ability Automation Settings
abilityAutomationSettings.label: Configure Ability Automation
abilityAutomationSettings.hint: Configure class ability automations for Censor, Tactician, and Shadow, plus ability range enforcement and malice features.

abilityAutomationEnabled.name: Ability Automation
abilityAutomationEnabled.hint: Master toggle for all ability automation.

judgementAutomation.name: Judgement
judgementAutomation.hint: Adds an action button to the Judgement chat card to mark the target, then tracks the judged creature and posts chat reminders for each trigger and a prompt to reapply Judgement as a free triggered action when the judged is defeated.

judgementBaneLock.name: Lock Ability Roll UI on Judgement Bane Trigger
judgementBaneLock.hint: When a judged creature makes a power roll, the Ability Roll UI is disabled briefly so the Censor has time to impose the bane or decline.

judgementBaneLockDuration.name: Bane Reminder Lock Duration (seconds)
judgementBaneLockDuration.hint: How long in seconds the Ability Roll UI is locked when a Judgement bane reminder is posted.

markAutomation.name: Mark
markAutomation.hint: Adds an Apply Mark button to the chat cards of all Mark-applying abilities, then posts a prompt to reapply Mark as a free triggered action when the marked target is defeated. Keeps track of marks which override when reapplied and those that don't.

aidAttackAutomation.name: Aid Attack
aidAttackAutomation.hint: Adds an Aid Attack button to the Aid Attack chat card which applies and sets a hook to remove the effect.

imNoThreatEnabled.name: I'm No Threat
imNoThreatEnabled.hint: Adds an I'm No Threat button to the I'm No Threat chat card. The buttons open a UI that allows picking a visual for the illusion, adds the active effect, and removes it when a power roll is made.

abyssalEvolutionEnabled.name: Enable Abyssal Evolution Button
abyssalEvolutionEnabled.hint: Injects an Abyssal Evolution button into chat when the Abyssal Evolution ability is used.

crossfadeEnabled.name: Enable Crossfade Automation
crossfadeEnabled.hint: Automates the Crossfade feature from SurfingBird's (bendking) Shadow Reshade supplement. Automatically adds an edge to the power roll when Crossfade applies, and posts a Disengage reminder to chat.

hiwEnabled.name: Hesitation Is Weakness
hiwEnabled.hint: Posts a chat notification with a Start Turn button when another hero ends their turn and the Hesitation Is Weakness ability can be triggered.

combatTurnLog.name: Combat Turn Log
combatTurnLog.hint: Posts a chat message each time a combatant starts or ends their turn.

combatRoundLog.name: Combat Round Log
combatRoundLog.hint: Posts a chat message at the start of each new combat round.

purifyingFireEnabled.name: Purifying Fire
purifyingFireEnabled.hint: Adds an Apply Fire Damage button alongside holy damage buttons when the acting hero has the Purifying Fire ability, so they can deal fire damage instead and trigger the target's fire weakness.

autoConfirmSelection.name: Auto-Confirm Target Selection
autoConfirmSelection.hint: When the required number of targets are selected in a target picker (ability targeting, Power Word: Kill, Raise Dead), automatically confirm without needing to press Enter.

rollDialogPillUI.name: Alternative Ability Roll UI
rollDialogPillUI.hint: Replaces the standard ability roll UI with an enhanced variant which displays modifiers by name, sometimes with their sources. Includes various unimplemented situational banes and edges that exist within the rules.

highGroundEnabled.name: High Ground Edge
highGroundEnabled.hint: Shows a High Ground edge pill in the roll dialog when the attacker is on higher elevation than the target. When DS Terrain Designer is active, the pill is informational only as DSTD already applies the edge. Without DSTD, DSCT applies the edge directly.

enforceAbilityRange.name: Enforce Ability Range
enforceAbilityRange.hint: Prevents Ability Roll UI from opening if target is out of range.

gmBypassRangeEnforcement.name: Director Bypasses Range Enforcement
gmBypassRangeEnforcement.hint: Director is exempt from range enforcement.

intAnimalsMenu.name: I'm No Threat Animals
intAnimalsMenu.label: Configure Animals
intAnimalsMenu.hint: Edit the list of animal disguises (name, icon, emoji) available in the I'm No Threat panel.

wallBuilderSettings.name: Wall Builder Settings
wallBuilderSettings.label: Configure Wall Builder
wallBuilderSettings.hint: Adjust material costs, damage values, wall restrictions, and wall builder defaults.

rubbleInvisible.name: Rubble is Invisible
rubbleInvisible.hint: When a wall block is broken, the rubble tile becomes invisible. The block remains invisible when fixed. Rubble is still detectable in Wall Builder's Inspect mode.

showWallBuilderButton.name: Show Wall Builder Button
showWallBuilderButton.hint: Show the Wall Builder toolbar button in the Walls layer controls (GM only).

moduleButtonsSettings.name: Module Button Visibility
moduleButtonsSettings.label: Configure Module Buttons
moduleButtonsSettings.hint: Choose which toolbar buttons this module adds to the token controls and wall layer.

toolboxEnabled.name: Group Buttons in Toolbox
toolboxEnabled.hint: Group the token control buttons under a single collapsible Combat Toolbox toggle.

showForcedMovementButton.name: Show Forced Movement Button
showForcedMovementButton.hint: Show the Forced Movement toolbar button in the token controls.

showGrabButton.name: Show Grab Button
showGrabButton.hint: Show the Grab Panel toolbar button in the token controls.

showTeleportButton.name: Show Teleport Button
showTeleportButton.hint: Show the Teleport toolbar button in the token controls.

showDamageConditionsButton.name: Show Damage & Conditions Button
showDamageConditionsButton.hint: Show the Damage & Conditions toolbar button in the token controls.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.hint: For developers trying to figure out problems with the module, provides verbose debug messages into the console.

experimentalObstacleArrow.name: Experimental Obstacle Arrow
experimentalObstacleArrow.hint: A discarded arrow design that seeks to display which sections of the movement overlap obstacles.

cornerCutMode.name: Corner Cut Movement
cornerCutMode.hint:
Collide on Corner Cuts (default): Diagonal movement clipping a wall to trigger collision damage.
Block Corner Cutting: Diagonal movement through a wall corner is illegal for pathfinding, may be buggy.

allowCrookedPushPull.name: Wiggly Lines for Push/Pull
allowCrookedPushPull.hint: Push and Pull are not restricted to a straight line during manual path selection, strictly against the rules but it's fun so it's here.

undoExpirationCheck.name: Undo Expiration Check
undoExpirationCheck.hint: When enabled, undo buttons check whether the token has moved from its last position before allowing undo.

cancelOnRightClick.name: Cancel Pickers on Right Click
cancelOnRightClick.hint: Right-clicking on the canvas cancels any active DSCT selection UI.

homeRulesSettings.name: Home Rules
homeRulesSettings.label: Configure Home Rules
homeRulesSettings.hint: Optional rule modifications for groups that prefer to run things differently.

homeRulesEnabled.name: Home Rules
homeRulesEnabled.hint: Master toggle for all home rule options.

homebrewOptions.name: Homebrew Options
homebrewOptions.hint: Enable support for third-party supplements and homebrew content.

compatibilitySettings.name: Compatibility
compatibilitySettings.label: Configure Compatibility
compatibilitySettings.hint: Settings for compatibility with other installed modules.

wb.colIconTitle: Icon shown on the canvas tile for this material.
wb.colOpacityTitle: Opacity of the canvas tile (0 = invisible, 1 = fully opaque).
wb.colBreakCostTitle: Squares of forced-movement momentum required to break through this material.
wb.colBreakDamageTitle: Damage dealt to a creature when they crash through this material.
wb.colMovementTitle: Whether this material blocks physical movement through it.
wb.colVisionTitle: Whether this material blocks line of sight for vision.
wb.colLightTitle: Whether this material blocks light from passing through.
wb.colSoundTitle: Whether this material blocks sound from passing through.

int.colIconTitle: Icon shown in the I'm No Threat panel.
int.colEmojiTitle: Emoji shown on the panel button (click to pick).

sampleMacros.title: Draw Steel: Combat Tools - Sample Macros
sampleMacros.body:
Would you like to import sample macros for Draw Steel: Combat Tools?

These provide ready-to-use buttons for Forced Movement, Grab, Teleport, and all other module features.
sampleMacros.optSkipUpdate: Don't ask until the next update

unusualItemCount.title: Unusual Item Count
unusualItemCount.body:
This operation is about to add {count} items to every actor sheet, which is more than expected (max {max}). Something may have gone wrong.

Proceed anyway?

notice.notActive: Draw Steel: Combat Tools not active.
notice.playerCannotUndoDamage: Players lack permission to undo damage. Enable "Players Can Undo Deaths via Target Damage" in Compatibility settings.

targetPicker.instruction: Select up to {max} target{s}. Enter or double-click to confirm. Escape to cancel.
targetPicker.maxTargets: You can only select up to {max} target{s}.
targetPicker.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one target before confirming.
targetPicker.couldTargetMore: {count} more valid target{s} in range. This ability can hit up to {max} total.

picker.chooseSource: Click a token to select it as the source. Right-click or Escape to cancel.
picker.chooseTargets: Click tokens to select or deselect. Enter to confirm, right-click or Escape to cancel.

wb.selectWallFirst: Select at least one wall first.
wb.gmOnlyConvert: Only the GM can convert walls.
wb.noWallsSelected: No walls selected. Switch to the Walls layer, select walls, then click Convert.
wb.squareSelectMode: Select squares for {mode}. Click to toggle, Enter to confirm, Right-Click to cancel.
wb.inspectMode: Inspect: hover tiles to see info. Right-click, Escape, or Stop Inspecting to exit.
wb.squareAlreadyHasWall: Square ({x},{y}) already has a wall block, skipping.
wb.settingsReset: Wall Builder settings reset to defaults.
wb.wallsConverted: Converted {walls} wall{ws}: {tiles} tile{ts} created/linked, {stubs} stub{ss} disabled.

fm.noTarget: You must target at least one token.
fm.grabbed: A grabbed creature can't be force moved except by a creature, object, or effect that has them grabbed.
fm.restrained: {name} is restrained and cannot be force moved.
fm.stabilityFullyResists: {name}'s stability fully resists the forced movement.
fm.autoPathFailed: DSCT | Auto-Path failed: Source and Target are in the exact same spot.
fm.fastMoveOnlyPushPull: DSCT | Fast Move is only available for Push and Pull. Falling back to manual pathing.
fm.noValidPath: No valid path to that square.
fm.pathInstruction: {type} {distance}{vert}: click squares to trace path. Right-click to undo. Enter to confirm. Escape to cancel.
fm.resolveInstruction: Click a highlighted target to resolve their forced movement. Escape to cancel.
fm.invalidType: Invalid type. Use Push, Pull, or Slide.
fm.noTokenToMove: Target or select the creature to move.
fm.targetNotFound: DSCT | Target token not found on canvas.
fm.chooseLanding: Choose where {name} lands. Escape to skip.

grab.alreadyGrabbing: {name} is already grabbing {max} creature{s} (the maximum for this ability).
grab.tooLarge: {grabber} cannot grab {target}: target is too large given their size and Might score.
grab.mustBeAdjacent: {name} must be placed adjacent to {grabber}, reverted.
grab.knockbackWhileGrabbed: {name} is grabbed and cannot use the Knockback maneuver.
grab.grabbedCannotMove: {name} is grabbed and cannot move. Moving ends the grab.

conditions.frightenedCannotMove: {name} is frightened of {source} and cannot willingly move closer.
conditions.frightenedBlocked: {name} is frightened of {source} and cannot move closer!

int.multipleTokens: Multiple tokens for {name} found - remove duplicates first.
int.outOfCombatAgain: {name} can use I'm No Threat outside of combat again.
int.notEnoughInsight: {name} doesn't have enough Insight to mimic a target.
int.alreadyUsedOutsideCombat: Already used outside of combat since last victory.
int.notEnoughMalice: Not enough Malice to use Mimic.
int.targetTooFar: {name} is beyond the 10 square range ({dist} squares away).
int.targetTooLarge: {name} is too large to mimic (size {targetSize} vs {mySize}).
int.noTarget: Select or target a token to open I'm No Threat.
int.illusionsEndedSettings: I'm No Threat: ended {count} active illusion{s} due to settings change.
int.animalsReset: I'm No Threat animals reset to defaults.
int.animalSettingsSaved: I'm No Threat animal settings saved. Reloading...

tactical.judgeOneTarget: Target exactly one creature to judge.
tactical.judgeRequiresAbility: The selected token does not have the Judgement ability.
tactical.markOneTarget: Target one or more creatures to mark.
tactical.markRequiresAbility: The selected token does not have the Mark ability.
tactical.markTooMany: This ability can mark up to {max} target{s}.
tactical.aidAttackOneSelect: Select exactly one token before using Aid Attack.
tactical.aidAttackOneTarget: Target exactly one adjacent enemy before using Aid Attack.
tactical.notEnoughWrath: Not enough Wrath to use this Judgement trigger.

dc.noTarget: Target at least one token first.
dc.requiresSource: Select a source token (control it) to apply {condition}.

dt.noDefeated: No defeated creatures on the board.
dt.reviveInstruction: REVIVE | Click skulls to select them, press ENTER to revive, or Right-Click to cancel.
dt.raiseDeadInstruction: RAISE DEAD | Click defeated creatures to select. Enter or double-click to confirm. Escape to cancel.
dt.noValidTargets: No valid targets found on the board.
dt.pwkInstruction: POWER WORD: KILL | Click NPCs to select. Enter or double-click to confirm. Escape to cancel.
dt.pwkCannotDeselect: {name} took the damage and cannot be deselected.
dt.pickDeathsInstruction: SELECT DEATHS | {summary} | Click to select. Enter or double-click to confirm. Escape to cancel.
dt.pickerTokensAlreadyDead: Death picker cancelled: selected tokens are already dead. The deaths were processed automatically.
dt.pickerMustDie: {name} took the damage and cannot be deselected.

squads.renamedAndLabeled: Combat squads renamed and labels applied.
squads.labelsAppliedExisting: Squad labels applied to existing groups.
squads.noCaptainCandidates: No valid captain candidates found for {group}.
squads.pickCaptain: Click a token to become captain of {group}. Escape to skip.
squads.pickSquadForCaptain: Click a minion to assign {name} as their captain (colors indicate squads). Escape to skip.

notice.noCompatModules: No compatible modules detected. Enable a supported module (like DS Quick Strike or DS Terrain Designer) to see compatibility settings.

conflict.minionDeath: Conflict: Draw Steel: Target Damage's Minion Damage Automation is enabled. Override Minion Defeat has been disabled to prevent double-processing.
conflict.dstdQuickStrike: Conflict: Draw Steel: Target Damage and Quick Strike are both enabled. Quick Strike compatibility has been turned off to prevent conflicts.

ta.noTargetForTargeted: Target at least one token for TARGETED mode.

tp.noValidDestinations: DSCT | No valid teleport destinations within range.
tp.chooseDestination: Choose where {name} teleports. Right-Click to cancel.
tp.mustSelectOne: DSCT | You must select exactly 1 token to teleport.
tp.noValidBurst: DSCT | Burst Teleport | No valid destinations for {name}.
tp.noBurstSource: DSCT | Burst Teleport | Select or specify a source token (the caster).
tp.noBurstTargets: DSCT | Burst Teleport | No tokens found within the burst area.
tp.undoExpiredMoved: DSCT | Undo expired: Token has moved since the teleport.
tp.undoExpiredGone: DSCT | Undo expired: Token no longer exists on this scene.

macros.gmOnly: Only the GM can install DSCT macros.
macros.gmOnlyDistribute: Only the GM can distribute abilities.
macros.abilitiesPackNotFound: Could not find the draw-steel.abilities compendium.
macros.knockbackNotFound: Could not find Knockback in the abilities pack.

chat.modifierAlreadyApplied: A modifier named "{name}" is already applied. Remove the existing one first or use a different name.
chat.presetExists: A preset named "{name}" already exists. Shift+click the save button to overwrite it.

sys.noTargetForDamage: No tokens targeted. Target one or more tokens before applying damage.
sys.grabApplyTarget: Target the creature{s} to apply Grabbed to.
sys.grabTooManyTargets: This ability can only grab up to {max} creature{s} at once.
sys.grabTargetTooLarge: {grabber} cannot grab {target}: target is too large.
sys.noConditionTargets: Target one or more tokens to apply the condition.
sys.noTargetForEffect: Target one or more tokens before applying this effect.

notice.noSceneForTemplate: Open a scene before configuring this ability template.

tactical.judgementFallen: {name} has fallen! You may use a free triggered action to apply Judgement to a new target.
tactical.judgementBaneReminder: Judgement: {name} is making a power roll. Spend 1 heroic resource to impose a bane.
tactical.judgementBaneLockCountdown: Roll locked for {seconds}s: Impose Bane or Decline?
tactical.judgementTauntedReminder: Judgement: {censorName} hit {targetNames} with a melee ability. Spend 1 Wrath to apply Taunted as a free triggered action.
tactical.judgementPotencyReminder: Judgement: {name} used an ability with a potency that targets only one creature within 10 squares of {censorName}, which allows {censorName} to reduce its potency by 1 by spending 1 wrath.
tactical.judgementPotencyUsed: Judgement: {name} used an ability with a potency that targets only one creature within 10 squares of {censorName}, its potency is reduced by 1.
tactical.markFallen: {name} has fallen! You may use a free triggered action to mark a new target within 10 squares.
tactical.aidAttack: Aid Attack: The next ally ability roll against {name} has an edge.

grab.escapeAfterFreeStrike: Escape Grab: {grabbed} escapes after taking a free strike from {grabber}.

squads.captainFell: Captain fallen: {name} has fallen as captain of {group}.
squads.captainLostSquad: Squad wiped: {name} is no longer the captain of {group}. Their entire squad has been wiped out.
squads.newCaptain: I Am The Captain Now: {name} is now the captain of {group}.

int.animalDisguise:
I'm No Threat {name} takes on the appearance of a {disguise}.

Strikes gain an edge, and Disengage gains +1 distance.
int.mimic:
I'm No Threat {name} appears as {target}, their allies may mistake {name} for the real thing.

This illusion covers your entire body, including clothing and armor, and alters your voice to sound like that of the creature. You gain an edge on tests made to convince the creature's allies that you are the creature.

Strikes gain an edge, and Disengage gains +1 distance.
int.illusionShatters: I'm No Threat {name}'s illusion shatters, the enemy never saw it coming! {name} gains a Surge.

label.verticalDistanceHint: Leave at 0 to keep it the same as the normal distance, requires "vertical" property.
label.excludeSourceSpaceHint: When enabled, the source token's space is excluded from the aura region. Disable to include the source space.

friendlyFire.case1Content: Ally Collision Warning: {source} is force moving {target} toward a collision. Would you like to shorten the movement to avoid unnecessary damage to your ally? This will also spare any creature they collide with.
friendlyFire.case2Content: Ally Collision: {source} is about to cause {target} to collide with {blockers}, dealing {dmg} damage to all parties.

fall.tooShort: but the fall is too short to deal damage.

statusId.label: Status
statusId.hint: The status effect to apply when a token enters or exits the Region.

overlay.label: Overlay
overlay.hint: Display the status effect as a token overlay.

dispositions.label: Filter by Disposition
dispositions.hint: Only trigger for tokens matching these dispositions. Leave empty to trigger for all.

action.label: Action
action.hint: What to do with the status effect when the event fires.

dispositions.label: Filter by Disposition
dispositions.hint: Only trigger for tokens matching these dispositions. Leave empty to trigger for all.

uuid.label: Active Effect
uuid.hint: The Active Effect to use when a token enters the Region.

disable.label: Disable on Exit
disable.hint: Disable the effect when the token leaves instead of deleting it.

dispositions.label: Filter by Disposition
dispositions.hint: Only trigger for tokens matching these dispositions. Leave empty to trigger for all.

uuid.label: Active Effect
uuid.hint: The Active Effect to add, reset, enable, disable, or delete.

action.label: Action
action.hint: What to do with the active effect when the event fires.

dispositions.label: Filter by Disposition
dispositions.hint: Only trigger for tokens matching these dispositions. Leave empty to trigger for all.

dsTerrain.name: DS Terrain Designer
dsTerrain.hint: Forced Movement reads terrain elevation data to resolve slopes and surface heights, ensuring pushed tokens land correctly on multi-level terrain. The High Ground roll modifier pill automatically defers to DS Terrain Designer's edge calculation when this module is active.

tagger.name: Tagger
tagger.hint: Wall tagging in Forced Movement uses the Tagger module API. Without Tagger, an internal flag-based fallback is used instead.

wallHeight.name: Wall Height
wallHeight.hint: The Wall Builder exposes height controls for setting the top and bottom elevation of individual walls.

dsTargetDamage.name: Draw Steel: Target Damage
dsTargetDamage.hint: DSCT cedes damage automation and moves all its buttons to the per-target collapsible boxes, minion defeat automation has a warning and safety automation if conflicting options are enabled.

dsTokenOverride.name: DS Token Override
dsTokenOverride.hint: Death Tracker accounts for Token Override's combatant animation hooks during kill and revival. Squad stamina tick bars are manually redrawn after minion deaths, and tint/alpha restoration on revival uses explicit targets instead of reading mid-animation document values.

healthEstimate.name: Health Estimate
healthEstimate.hint: DSCT patches Health Estimate's break conditions and estimation logic for minion tokens in active combat squads, based on the Minion Health Estimate Display setting.
